title: Recruitment Support Admin (Central | $1,800 | 1 Year)
description:
We are seeking a highly organised Recruitment Support Admin to join our team for a large-scale hiring project. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast‑paced environment, enjoys operational work, and is passionate about delivering a smooth candidate experience.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate interview scheduling at scale, ensuring timely communication with candidates and hiring teams
  • Manage candidate data and track hiring progress across multiple roles
  • Support recruiters with administrative tasks including system updates, document collection, and assessment coordination
  • Prepare reports and ensure accuracy of recruitment records
  • Provide excellent service to candidates and internal stakeholders

Requirements:

  • Prior experience in recruitment coordination, HR admin, or high‑volume operations
  • Strong organisational skills with excellent attention to detail
  • Ability to multitask and work under tight timelines
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and recruitment systems (experience with ATS is a plus)
  • A proactive team player with strong communication skills

Next Step:

  • Send your updated resume, apply here or submit to jolinda.yow@adecco.com
  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted


Jolinda Yow Jia Min

Direct Line: 6697 7782

EA License No: 91C2918

Personnel Registration Number: R1654296

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
